context: The agent was given a Flux CD HelmRelease failure (ClusterRole ownership conflict) and asked to classify the layer, collect evidence, identify root cause, provide a fix, state blast radius, and give validation steps.

checklist.name: correct_layer
checklist.description: Classifies the failure as the chart rendering or reconciliation layer — NOT source or runtime

checklist.name: evidence_commands
checklist.description: Lists at least 2 evidence commands: flux logs --kind=HelmRelease, kubectl get clusterrole, helm list -n cert-manager, or kubectl get events -n cert-manager

checklist.name: root_cause
checklist.description: Correctly identifies root cause: pre-existing ClusterRole not owned by this HelmRelease causes ownership conflict

checklist.name: fix
checklist.description: Fix includes helm uninstall cert-manager followed by flux reconcile helmrelease, or resource adoption via Helm metadata annotation

checklist.name: blast_radius
checklist.description: Blast radius notes that helm uninstall deletes cert-manager resources (certificates, CRDs) causing a brief certificate issuance lapse

checklist.name: validation
checklist.description: Validation includes: flux get helmrelease shows Ready=True and kubectl get pods -n cert-manager shows all pods running
